description_long: This traffic barricade features a robust A-frame structure with two wide, rectangular panels displaying alternating orange and white diagonal stripes, designed for high visibility in urban environments. The panels are supported by a black metal frame, with the top corners capped in orange for added prominence. The legs are angled outward, providing stability, and end in flat, squared feet for secure placement on various surfaces. The central section between the panels is open, reducing weight and wind resistance while maintaining structural integrity. The surface finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of painted or coated metal and plastic. No warning signage or lights are present, but the reflective striping pattern serves as a visual alert for pedestrians and vehicles.
description: A-frame traffic barricade with orange and white diagonal reflective stripes on two wide panels, supported by a black metal frame and orange-capped corners. Designed for high visibility and stability in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows two wide panels with orange and white diagonal stripes, black frame, and orange-capped corners.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the A-frame structure, angled legs, and the thin profile of the panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black reverse side of the panels and the supporting frame, with orange caps visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the A-frame and angled legs.
attribute_reflective_striping_pattern: Diagonal orange and white stripes, alternating, medium width, repeated across both panels.
